text:
Once upon a time, a little mouse moved around the farm looking for something to eat that didn't bother much odor. There were strawberries out; the first taste was so tasty that it melted all the mouse's inhibitions away. After one bite, the mouse felt like chewing on them all day long!

The little mouse sat down at a sunlit patch of berries and went completely nuts munching away. Each berry tasted sweeter than the one before. It was fun and silly just munching on those berries all day long. 

Even the birds were curious. They'd go over and munch on a berry or two, then fly away sallying something silly like "Missinky Wibblewobbleberries!"

The sun started to go down, and the little mouse stopped eating. It looked at the berries like they were stars in a sky full of stars. No more strawberries for a while... maybe tomorrow?

The bird flew away humming a tune. The little mouse sat there a moment thinking about
